title: Render stale lease and deferred markers in bead rows
description: Build on the elapsed-time row work and deferred-cycle reporter state to distinguish stale running beads and show a current-cycle deferred indicator directly in the bead list without making deferred state persist inaccurately across cycles.
acceptance_criteria: `src/agent_takt/tui/render.py` marks expired leases on `in_progress` beads with an accessible stale indicator such as `stale?` plus distinct styling.
Bead rows can show a current-cycle deferred marker such as `⊘ deferred` when the bead id is present in the deferred set from the reporter.
Row layout still truncates titles correctly after adding elapsed, stale, and deferred suffixes.
